title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/5787748
body: " OFSI General licence INT/2025/5787748 OFSI General licence INT/2025/5787748 Publication notice   On 28 March 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/5787748 under Regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) and Regulation 32 of the Republic of Belarus (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Belarus Regulations”). This General Licence allows persons to make payments to Arbitration Associations and Arbitrators to cover fees and expenses for their arbitration services. The General Licence also permits Arbitrators and Arbitration Associations to direct payment of, receive and use such payments to cover Arbitration Costs. "
